close_reason: Implemented tw wrapper with generic config-driven approach
description:
Create wrapper scripts for native language tools that auto-sync deps:

1. `go` wrapper - detects `go get`, `go mod tidy`, etc. and:
   - Runs the real go command
   - Regenerates go-deps.toml if go.mod/go.sum changed
   - Triggers godeps cell refresh (direnv reload or similar)

2. `cargo` wrapper - detects `cargo add`, `cargo update`, etc. and:
   - Runs the real cargo command
   - Regenerates rust-deps.toml if Cargo.lock changed
   - Triggers rustdeps cell refresh

3. `uv` wrapper - detects `uv add`, `uv sync`, etc. and:
   - Runs the real uv command
   - Regenerates python-deps.toml if pyproject.toml changed
   - Triggers pydeps cell refresh

This provides seamless DX where deps cells stay in sync automatically without waiting for `tk build`.
title: Native tool wrappers for auto-sync (go, cargo, uv)
